name: batch_edit
description: Edit files with Python-powered operations: replace (single or multi-file), line range replace/delete/insert, pattern-based delete/insert, Python transform/script (inline or stdin), sed expressions, indent analysis, brace/paren/bracket balance check, and prepend/append.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: replace, multi-file-replace, replace-lines, delete-lines, delete-pattern, insert, insert-at-line, insert-before, insert-after, fix-indent, show-indent, check-balance, append, prepend, multi-replace, transform, script, sed, multi-file-sed, or exec

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Action-specific arguments: old/new content, line numbers, patterns, Python expression, inline script code (or pipe code via stdin)

examples.expected: Applies inline Python script to transform file content

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multi-step heredoc+python3 patterns and N separate replace calls across M files with a single call, saving up to N-1 steps per batch edit operation.
